name: rating
description: Interactive or read-only star rating with configurable icon, half-value granularity, and accessibility increment/decrement actions.

props.name: value
props.description: Current rating value between 0 and max.

props.name: onValueChange
props.description: Callback fired when the user taps a rating icon.

props.name: readOnly
props.description: When true, tapping icons has no effect.

props.name: allowHalf
props.description: When true, tapping the left half of an icon sets a 0.5 increment value.

props.name: size
props.description: Size of each icon in pixels.

props.name: icon
props.description: Icon character or emoji used for each rating unit.

props.name: filledColor
props.description: Color of filled rating icons; defaults to the theme warning color.

props.name: emptyColor
props.description: Color of empty rating icons; defaults to the theme border color.

props.name: label
props.description: Optional label displayed above the rating row.

examples.label: Example 1
Example 2
examples.code:
// 10-point scale (e.g. NPS score)
<Rating value={nps} max={10} onValueChange={setNps} label="Likelihood to recommend" />

examples.label: Example 3
examples.code:
// Small read-only rating for a product card
<Rating value={product.averageRating} readOnly allowHalf size={16} />
